description: Interactive Amazon map for Creatures of the Deep — fish, creatures, items, and the map monster.
intro: Amazon is the last 'normal' area in Creatures of the Deep. It has similar dimensions to Great Lakes and Thailand. After exploring the previous zones thoroughly, you should be able to complete your collection without particular difficulty. Click on a fish in the side menu to see the details.

monster.name: boiuna
monster.snippet: The spot changes everyday. Check Discord to know the current spot.

name: Amazon

names.it: disco in vinile di bossa nova
names.pt: disco de vinil de bossa nova

title: Amazon map
